_comment: ArcGIS FeatureServer query for Colorado LIHTC properties — CHFA's HousingTaxCreditProperties_view service (2025-current, 926 features). Replaces the prior HUD LIHTCDB cache which stopped at YR_PIS = 2020. The fetch script's toGeoJsonFeature() detects this schema (has ReservationYear / AwardYear fields) and maps to HUD-compatible field names so existing consumers (Opportunity Finder, Colorado Deep Dive, Market Analysis, CHFA Portfolio) keep working without code changes. Output preserves both HUD-aliased fields AND the richer CHFA fields (ComplianceStatus, ProjectType, *AMIUnits, etc.).
